creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text: The iSCSI messages are obviously related to the iscsi(4) driver, sure, but they are not fatal - in fact they should be completely harmless.  The panic in the screenshot doesn't seem to be related to iscsi at all - it's panicing in the mpt(4) driver.  Thus my suggestion to switch the emulated hardware to something else, to see if the workaround helps.  If it does, the logical next step would be to file a bug for mpr(4).
